creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
miwi        2009-01-16 09:42:22 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    multimedia           Makefile 
  Added files:
    multimedia/dvbsnoop  Makefile distinfo pkg-descr 
    multimedia/dvbsnoop/files dmx.h frontend.h 
                              patch-src-dvbsnoop.h 
  Log:
  DVBsnoop is an analyzer for DVB broadcast streams / MPEG transport
  streams.
  
  DVBsnoop is a program to monitor, analyze, debug, dump or view
  dvb/mpeg/dsm-cc/mhp stream information (TS, PES, SECTION) (e.g.
  digital television) send via satellite, cable or terrestrial.
  
  WWW: http://dvbsnoop.sourceforge.net/
  
  PR:             ports/130515
  Submitted by:   J.R. Oldroyd <fbsd at opal.com>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.287     +1 -0      ports/multimedia/Makefile
  1.1       +31 -0     ports/multimedia/dvbsnoop/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/multimedia/dvbsnoop/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +184 -0    ports/multimedia/dvbsnoop/files/dmx.h (new)
  1.1       +278 -0    ports/multimedia/dvbsnoop/files/frontend.h (new)
  1.1       +10 -0     ports/multimedia/dvbsnoop/files/patch-src-dvbsnoop.h (new)
  1.1       +8 -0      ports/multimedia/dvbsnoop/pkg-descr (new)
